title: EUSPA, EU-Rail and ERA deepen cooperation on space-based rail services
summary: EUSPA, Europes Rail and the European Union Agency for Railways are expanding cooperation on Galileo, EGNOS and Copernicus applications for rail.
body: Building on the EGNOS4Rail initiative, EUSPA, EU-Rail, ERA and the European Commission are enlarging cooperation through an expert group assessing space-based communication and positioning for railway signalling. Copernicus already supports predictive maintenance by providing data on rail infrastructure and its surroundings.
